pages.image_tooltip: A cave-dwelling duck that can neither see nor swim

pages.clone.clone_tooltip: Egg must be thrown to hatch
pages.activity.activity_tooltip: Active randomly throughout the day or based on specific factors
pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7Their blindness makes them suceptible to walking into hazards, ensure enclosures are safe!
pages.feature_2.tooltip: §7What remains of their eyes are highly sensitive, they will avoid both natural and player-placed light
pages.feature_2.title_two_line: Light at the end of the Tunnel
pages.feature_3.tooltip: §7Being relatively recent animals, they are able to breed after eating hanging roots
